text:
The
The computer angs while booting with the following message

isp0:  <Qlogic ISP2200 PCI FC-AL Adapter) port 0x3000-0x30ff mem
0xf4200000-xf4200fff irq 5 at device 4.9 on pic2
isp0: Unknown async code 0xa301

I've tried two different computers.
With Linux and Win2K everything works fine.
